name: Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------ESPRESSO SYRUP-------------------------------
1/4 cup Water
1/3 cup Sugar
1/2 cup Very strong brewed espresso
1/4 cup Italian brandy
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
3 Egg yolks
1/3 cup Sugar
1/3 cup Sweet Marsala
1/2 lb Mascarpone (room temperature)
1 cup Heavy cream
---------------------------------FINISHING---------------------------------
1 cup Heavy cream
2 tablespoons Sugar
Cinnamon
Coffee grounds
For the syrup: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then cool. Stir in espresso and brandy.
For the filling: Whisk yolks in a bowl until smooth. Gradually whisk in sugar and Marsala. Cook over simmering water until thickened. Remove from heat and beat with an electric mixer until chilled. Blend Mascarpone into a smooth mixture. Fold in the filling. Whip cream and fold it in.
Slice Pan di Spagna thinly. Place slices in a gratin dish, soaking with syrup using a brush. Spread half the filling over the slices. Repeat with more Pan di Spagna, syrup, and filling. Top with final layer of Pan di Spagna, soaking with remaining syrup. Whisk cream with sugar and spread on top. Sprinkle cinnamon and coffee grounds. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
